identity.name: Amaris Consulting
identity.essence: A partner that turns ambition into concrete outcomes — grounded in human expertise, global reach, and a collaborative spirit that makes complex growth achievable.
identity.positioning: Independent global technology and management consulting subsidiary of Mantu, positioned between generalist system integrators and niche boutiques: broad enough to serve across industries and geographies, focused enough to embed real expertise at every engagement.

medium.note: Century Gothic only ships in Regular and Bold across Office; use Bold for medium emphasis.

accent.note: Secondary font used in select Elementor blocks (web only).

fonts.note: Century Gothic is the named brand face (licensed system/Office font, ships Regular 400 + Bold 700). It is relied on for client-side editing but cannot be embedded (non-redistributable). General Sans is the OFL embeddable substitute used by server-side render_* tools and web — see fontFiles + embedFamily.

fontFiles.embed: fonts/otf/ (+ fonts/ttf/) — General Sans, OFL, embeddable
fontFiles.note: Century Gothic (the named brand face) is a licensed system/Office font — present on the client's own machines but NOT redistributable, so it cannot be embedded server-side. General Sans is the OFL embeddable substitute: server-rendered deliverables embed it (self-contained everywhere); when the client edits on a licensed machine the named Century Gothic still resolves; web uses the General Sans woff2 set.

logo.notes: Primary SVG uses currentColor stroke — renders white on dark backgrounds, navy on light. No separate white variant needed.

catalog.notes: Thought leadership report cover — already in brand blue, use without overlay

principles: Lead with expertise: substance before style — professional depth is never sacrificed for visual flair.
Human over abstract: favour real workplace photography with controlled treatment over illustration or pure abstraction.
Systematic clarity: a strict two-weight typographic system (Regular / Bold Century Gothic) enforces hierarchy without decorative variation.
Navy as foundation: dark indigo (#272674) anchors every composition; warmth and sector colour are deliberate relief, not competition.

Motif as signature: the orbit + stepping-stone family (hairline arcs, accent-colour dots, ghost AMARIS wordmark, ring bullets) and the thin blush/peach rule are the recurring decorative motifs — both used with bounded discipline (≤2 arcs + ≤3 dots per slide; ghost wordmark ≤10 % opacity), never inventively, never a third family.
Generous margins: 64 px (or 40 pt) interior margins create breathing room; content never crowds the frame.
Colour indexing by sector: accent colours carry semantic meaning (life-sciences green, engineering purple, telecom yellow, digital blue) — respect the mapping.
signatureElements: Thin horizontal accent rule in blush/peach (#EBC4B4 / --color-secondary) anchoring top edge of cover and section-divider slides and left-margin tick on content slides.
Dark navy (#272674) full-field or gradient scrim over hero photographs at 55–78 % opacity, ensuring white-text legibility.
Century Gothic in Bold 700 only for all display/heading use — no intermediate weights.
White logo (currentColor SVG variant) positioned top-left on dark/image slides.
Monospace footer bar (8–9 pt) at slide bottom with logo mark, client name, confidentiality note, and page count.
Sector-indexed accent colours used exclusively as data/UI tags, not as background fields.
Midnight gradient (135 deg, #020381 → #2874fc) for hero/full-bleed alternative to flat navy.
Content-width constraint (985 px max on 1280 px canvas) maintaining lateral margin discipline.

Orbit arc — hairline arc (--motif-line-weight, ~0.75–1 px) on a large off-canvas radius, 1–2 per slide, sweeping across cover and section-divider; white @ 25–40 % on dark, navy/blush @ 12–18 % on light.

Stepping-stone dot — solid accent-colour circle sitting on an orbit arc with a soft glow, rotating the non-semantic decorative palette (--orbit-dot-1..4: blue/mint/yellow/purple); the literal visual of the 'Your stepping stone' tagline.
Ghost wordmark — oversized outline AMARIS letterform bleeding off the right edge of content slides at ≤10 % opacity (--motif-ghost-opacity), navy/blush outline only.
Circle ring bullet — small outline ring with a navy numeral for numbered lists (bullet-ring asset), a vertical stack echoing the stepping-stone path.
antiPatterns: Using sector accent colours as slide background fields or large colour blocks — they are semantic tags only in data/UI contexts. The decorative orbit dots (≤0.8 in dia) are exempt: they rotate the palette non-semantically and are never a background field.
Applying intermediate font weights (Medium 500, SemiBold 600) — Century Gothic has no true intermediate; these silently revert to Regular in Office.
Placing logos on low-contrast backgrounds without the prescribed indigo overlay.

Unbounded ornament: exceeding the motif cap (≤2 orbit arcs + ≤3 stepping-stone dots per slide; ghost wordmark ≤10 % opacity), or introducing a third decorative motif family beyond the orbit family and the blush rule.
Using Quicksand outside web Elementor contexts (it is a web-only secondary face, not a slide/document face).
Full-bleed photography without the navy overlay — raw photos break white-text legibility.
Expanding content beyond the 985 px / 64 px margin zone — crowding the frame.

motifs.name: Orbit + Stepping-Stone
motifs.evidence: Recovered from the official Amaris Consulting PowerPoint master (clients/amaris/.build-history/source-Amaris-Consulting-Template.pptx, SHA-256 match to the brand build source) and its rendered visual analysis: hairline orbit arcs, accent-colour planet dots on those arcs, an oversized ghost AMARIS wordmark, and outline-ring numbered bullets.

marks.role: transition / hero arc — hairline arc sweeping across the composition behind hero text
hero / cover accent — solid accent-colour dot sitting on an orbit arc, rotating the decorative palette
content watermark — oversized outline AMARIS bleeding off the right edge at low opacity
numbered-list marker — outline ring with navy numeral for ordered lists
large-fill / dominant background — tileable faint dot-on-arc field for full-bleed motif use

evidence.note: No motion was captured from the static source PPTX. Derived from the brand's restraint principles (substance before style; systematic clarity; motif used with bounded discipline) and visualAxes (ornament: moderate, density: balanced) — Amaris leads with expertise, not flair, so motion is a quiet reveal/transition layer, never cinematic. Reference instance for the cross-surface motion dimension (PLAN_motion-capability).

spec.rationale: Fade + a short staggered entrance is the house idiom; the orbit arc may draw on a cover or divider as an 'explain' line-draw (one per view, echoing the motif family). prefers-reduced-motion collapses all of it to static. required:false keeps motion available but advisory — a static deck is never failed for omitting it.

evidence.note: Synthesized from amaris.com public brand surface; Tier 4–6 for colours and typography, Tier 8 for photography.

Official Amaris Consulting PowerPoint blank; user-supplied 2026-06-01. Confirms Century Gothic, #272774 primary, blush #EBC4B4 accent2, 'Your stepping stone' tagline, oversized-wordmark background motif, ~2,194 custom icon shapes.
CSS custom-property token set generated from charter.json + live amaris.com :root vars. Confirms palette, typography scale, spacing, and layout widths.
Co-created anchor template derived from official PPTX master. Encodes blush accent rule, navy scrim, white logo position, monospace overline, and 64 px margin discipline.
Content slide anchor. Encodes brand-strip (4 px navy + 88 px blush tick), footer-bar with logo mark, 64 px margins.
Section-divider anchor. Confirms navy full-field or photo-with-indigo-wash, blush rule under section title, white logo bottom-left.
